citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: AI includes a wide variety of reasoning algorithms for solving different types of reasoning problems. Some use symbolic representations (e.g., search trees) while others are numerical in nature (e.g., neural nets operating on feature vectors).
